CREATE TABLE test_json (a String, b UInt32);
SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "Hello", "b": 111}{"a": "World", "b": 123}{"a": "Hello", "b": 112}{"a": "World", "b": 124}$$);
SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "A", "b": 1}{"a": "B", "b": 2}$$) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "C", "b": 3}$$);
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "A", "b": 1}{"a": "B", "b": 2}$$)) AS total_count;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "A", "b": 1}{"a": "B", "b": 2}$$)) AS subquery WHERE b > 1;
WITH format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "X", "b": 10}{"a": "Y", "b": 20}$$) AS parsed_data SELECT * FROM parsed_data WHERE b > 15;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, SUM(b) AS total FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "A", "b": 5}{"a": "A", "b": 10}{"a": "B", "b": 15}$$) GROUP BY a) AS grouped_data;
CREATE TABLE another_table (name String, amount UInt32);
SELECT (SELECT SUM(b) FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'name String, amount UInt32', $${"name": "C", "amount": 70}{"name": "D", "amount": 80}$$)) + (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM another_table) AS grand_total;
